headline: $1B Crypto Risk: AI Agents Deemed Untrustworthy

article.title: AI agents must be treated as untrusted systems: Researchers
article.summary: AI agents are becoming increasingly popular among crypto users, with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire predicting that billions of AI agents will be operating within five years.

headline: Uniswap Scam Loses $400K to Fake Google Ads

article.title: Scammers make $400K through fake Uniswap ads on Google
article.summary: A blockchain analyst has warned that malicious phishing advertisements impersonating Uniswap have appeared on Google Search, which has netted attackers at least $400,000.

headline: Danish Housing Market Faces 20% Crash Risk

article.title: Danish Central Bank Warns of Housing Risks on Price Rally
article.summary: A surge in Copenhagen home prices is spilling over to the rest of Denmark, posing growing risks to the country’s lenders, the central bank said.

headline: ECB Raises Inflation Forecast to 2% in June

article.title: ECB Set to Lift Its Inflation Outlook in June, Lane Tells Nikkei
article.summary: The European Central Bank will probably raise its quarterly projection for inflation next month as the Iran war keeps energy prices elevated, Chief Economist Philip Lane told Nikkei in remarks published Monday.

headline: $1B AI Coding Risk Looms Over Crypto Market
